title: Hisense Conducts Training for Customer Service Team
content:
Hisense Middle East organized a training program for the Al-Bahar customer care service team at the customer service center. This training provided the team with the necessary technical knowledge and skills to provide service and support for Hisense televisions and home appliances. The training was conducted by Mohammad Khaleliah, technical manager from Hisense Middle East. We had over 20 participants from the customer service team. The team were also provided with updates on the latest product innovations from Hisense.

The Hisense technical team usually conducts regular customer service and support training events with partners to ensure that a high level of customer service and satisfaction is maintained for its brands.

For further details please contact:

Vishwas Valerian Pinto,
Assistant Service Manager, BEEA
Vishwas.Pinto@albahargroup.com, ☎: 99814907
excerpt: Hisense Middle East organized a training program for the Al-Bahar customer care service team at the customer service center. This training provided the team with the necessary technical knowledge and skills to provide service and support for Hisense televisions and home appliances.

title: Cloud9 Participates in KNPC Exhibition Event
content:
Cloud9 by Al-Bahar Electronics participated in KNPC staff exhibition event in October 2022. Kuwait National Petroleum Company organized this exhibition for brands to showcase or demonstrate their products, their innovations, and services to its target audience. It is a platform for face-to-face interaction and focuses on encouraging consumer engagements.

There was a popup booth for Cloud9 where KNPC staff got special discounts on electronics and home appliances. Our team displayed a wide variety of products from Hisense, LG, General Electric and Home Elite for the KNPC staff. The KNPC staff were very engaged and interested in our products. Cloud9 participated in this event to increase brand awareness and exposure for its products.

For further details please contact:

Rabih Ahmad Fawaz,
Sr Retail Operations Manager, BEEA
Rabih.Fawaz@albahargroup.com, ☎: 97891419
excerpt: Cloud9 by Al-Bahar Electronics participated in KNPC staff exhibition event in October 2022. Kuwait National Petroleum Company organized this exhibition for brands to showcase or demonstrate their products, their innovations, and services to its target audience.

title: BCPC Participates in Pamacong Handog Event
content:
Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar Group consumer division (BCPC) organized the Pamacong Handog event at the Philippine embassy in December 2022 under the guidance of the Embassy's labor office. The event was organized as part of Al-Bahar group social responsibility initiatives. With over one thousand five hundred participants, the event was well attended by members of the community.

We were able to use this opportunity to increase brand exposure, showcase our products and distribute samples to the audience. In addition to creating visibility for our brands, participation at the event helped to enhance the reputation of BCPC as a leading consumer products company in Kuwait.

For further details please contact:

Ahmed Samy Elgamal,
Admin and Public Relations Manager – BCPC
Ahmed.Elgamal@albahargroup.com, ☎: 99023720
excerpt: Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar Group consumer division (BCPC) organized the Pamacong Handog event at the Philippine embassy in December 2022 under the guidance of the Embassy's labor office. The event was organized as part of Al-Bahar group social responsibility initiatives.

title: BSC Delighted to Welcome COSCO Dignitaries
content:
We at Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar group (BKGH) are delighted to welcome dignitaries from our partners COSCO (China Ocean Shipping Company) Mr. Qiu Jinguang, Chairman and President of COSCO Shipping West Asia Fze and Mr. Zhou Haowei, Director - Operations, Equipment and Commercial as they visited the offices of Bahar Shipping Company (BSC).

During the visit, the teams reviewed the ongoing business and discussed ways and means to tap into more opportunities for growth. Bahar Shipping Company has had a longstanding relationship with COSCO that goes back over 40 years.

The senior delegation was called on Eng. Essa A. Al Mulla, General Manager – Kuwait Port Authority where they were able to present COSCO and its efforts to grow the shipping business in the region.

For further details please contact:

Nishad Victor,
General Manager, BSC
Nishad.Victor@albahargroup.com, ☎: 99053955
excerpt: We at Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar group (BKGH) are delighted to welcome dignitaries from our partners COSCO (China Ocean Shipping Company) Mr. Qiu Jinguang, Chairman and President of COSCO Shipping West Asia Fze and Mr. Zhou Haowei, Director - Operations, Equipment and Commercial as they visited the offices of Bahar Shipping Company (BSC).

title: EGTC Back to School Campaign
content:
EGTC partnered with 3M to distribute the complete range of Post It, Command, and Scotch Range of products for the BTS (Back to School) Season. The 3M range has a variety of must-haves for school and office supplies including multiple kinds of sticky notes, tapes, adhesives, and more.

The EGTC sales and distribution team distributed the products in over 50+ locations, covering modern trade, Coops, hypermarkets, and specialty retailers targeting school & office stationery for the season on specific fast-moving Promo SKU's.

For further details please contact:

Elizabeth Fernandes,
Senior Demand Planning Specialist, BCPC- IBD
Elizabeth.Fernandes@albahargroup.com
excerpt: EGTC partnered with 3M to distribute the complete range of Post It, Command, and Scotch Range of products for the BTS (Back to School) Season. The 3M range has a variety of must-haves for school and office supplies including multiple kinds of sticky notes, tapes, adhesives, and more.

title: BSC Outperforms Global Index
content:
Al-Bahar Shipping Company is proud to announce that in recent quarterly global ranking results released by COSCO (China Ocean Shipping Company, Limited), Al-Bahar Shipping Company has outperformed the global index on major KPIs. The comprehensive ranking system which benchmarks the performance against 26 different key performance indicators is a major achievement for BSC and a leading indicator of the high standards of operational efficiency that BSC has been implementing in Kuwait.

Al-Bahar Shipping Company has been representing COSCO in Kuwait since 1980. The Beijing headquartered shipping and logistics services supplier company owns over 1100 ships and calls at over a thousand ports worldwide.

For further details please contact:

Nishad Victor,
General Manager, BSC
Nishad.Victor@albahargroup.com
excerpt: Al-Bahar Shipping Company is proud to announce that in recent quarterly global ranking results released by COSCO (China Ocean Shipping Company, Limited), Al-Bahar Shipping Company has outperformed the global index on major KPIs.

title: BKGH Holds Advanced Excel Training Program
content:
Mohammed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar (BKGH) group organized an advanced Excel modeling training program for our team in October 2022. More than twenty candidates from different business units across Al-Bahar Group participated in the program. As part of the group HR initiative, we are working on building a culture of acquiring knowledge and skills at the workplace. This helps our team members develop a growth mindset and habit of continuous learning.

BKGH has been organizing workshops, training programs and seminars on a regular basis to improve the employee knowledge base and performance. The excel training program was the fourth in a series of such training and development initiatives.

For further details please contact:

Bassil Haddad,
Sr. Human Resources Manager, BKGH
Bassil.Haddad@albahargroup.com, ☎: 66766955
excerpt: Mohammed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar (BKGH) group organized an advanced Excel modeling training program for our team in October 2022. More than twenty candidates from different business units across Al-Bahar Group participated in the program.

title: BPC Implements AV Project at Sahara Murooj
content:
Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar & Partners has made a landmark achievement by deploying for the first time a customized contoured video wall solution for Sahara Real Estate at the prestigious Murooj project. The uniquely shaped structure is built using customized panels from leading global brands based on direct view technology.

The three-meter-tall video wall structure with its distinctive and unique design is a multipurpose digital signage that can be used for informational signage and advertisement purposes. Al-Bahar & Partners identified and sourced products from multiple solution providers to create a solution that is weather rated to withstand harsh outdoor conditions in the region. The BPC team now looks forward to secure more projects in this sector.

For further details please contact:

S. Vijay Victor,
Sales Manager-AV Solutions, BPC
Vijay.Victor@albahargroup.com, ☎: 66516802
excerpt: Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar & Partners has made a landmark achievement by deploying for the first time a customized contoured video wall solution for Sahara Real Estate at the prestigious Murooj project.

title: BPC Wins 3 Awards from Canon Middle East
content:
Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar & Partners attended the annual Canon Middle East & Turkey Partners Conference in UAE. The conference was held at the contemporary "Museum of the Future" in Dubai, under the theme of Rethink. Revive. Reach. At the end of this productive conference, and at the 2022 Annual Awards Ceremony, Al Bahar & Partners team have been presented with three prestigious awards from Canon given for their outstanding performance and achievements for the year 2022, covering best customer reach, best people award, and best value creation award.

For further details please contact:

Amr W. Salem,
Service Manager – Cluster 1 BEEA, BPC, OTC
Amr.Salem@albahargroup.com, ☎: 50587088
excerpt: Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar & Partners attended the annual Canon Middle East & Turkey Partners Conference in UAE. The conference was held at the contemporary "Museum of the Future" in Dubai, under the theme of Rethink. Revive. Reach.

title: BPC Implements Apple Pay for Gulf Bank
content:
Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar & Partners joined hands with Thales to successfully implement and launch the Apple Pay platform at Gulf Bank Kuwait. Gulf Bank are now able to give their customer simpler, safer, private banking experience that enables their customers to enjoy contactless payment technology through all the apple devices. With Apple Pay, all customers can enjoy shopping with contactless payment technology (Tap & Pay) using their iPhone, Apple Watch, iPad and Mac devices.

This service is available at most points of sale in Kuwait and around the world, which makes purchasing transactions easier, safer and more private without the need for a physical card.

For further details please contact:

Ankur Saluja,
Divisional Manager – Business & Digital Solutions, BPC
Ankur.Saluja@albahargroup.com, ☎: 94033973
excerpt: Mohamed Abdulrahman Al-Bahar & Partners joined hands with Thales to successfully implement and launch the Apple Pay platform at Gulf Bank Kuwait. Gulf Bank are now able to give their customer simpler, safer, private banking experience that enables their customers to enjoy contactless payment technology through all the apple devices.
